recommendations.title: Force Majeure
recommendations.overview: While holidaying in the French Alps, a Swedish family deals with acts of cowardliness as an avalanche breaks out.

recommendations.title: The Square
recommendations.overview: A prestigious Stockholm museum's chief art curator finds himself in times of both professional and personal crisis as he attempts to set up a controversial new exhibit.

recommendations.title: Triangle of Sadness
recommendations.overview: A celebrity model couple are invited on a luxury cruise for the uber-rich, helmed by an unhinged, alcoholic captain. What first appears Instagrammable ends catastrophically, leaving the survivors stranded on a desert island in a struggle of hierarchy

recommendations.title: Play
recommendations.overview: In central Gothenburg, Sweden, a group of boys, aged 12-14, robbed other children on about 40 occasions between 2006 and 2008. The thieves used an elaborate scheme called the 'little brother number' or 'brother trick', involving advanced role-play an

recommendations.title: Good Will Hunting
recommendations.overview: Will Hunting is a headstrong, working-class genius who is failing the lessons of life. After one too many run-ins with the law, Will's last chance is a psychology professor, who might be the only man who can reach him.

recommendations.title: Feel the Beat
recommendations.overview: After failing to make it on Broadway, April returns to her hometown and reluctantly begins training a misfit group of young dancers for a competition.

recommendations.title: Warning
recommendations.overview: Loneliness, death and the meaning of life, explored through vastly separate lives colliding in interweaving short stories set in future Earth.

recommendations.title: Secrets of the Saqqara Tomb
recommendations.overview: This documentary follows a team of local archaeologists excavating never before explored passageways, shafts, and tombs, piecing together the secrets of Egypt’s most significant find in almost 50 years in Saqqara.

recommendations.title: Casting JonBenet
recommendations.overview: Twenty years after the modern world's most notorious child murder, the legacy of the crime and its impact are explored.

recommendations.title: Mountains May Depart
recommendations.overview: The life of Tao, and those close to her, is explored in three different time periods: 1999, 2014, and 2025.
